title: ORDER BY broken when using UNION ALL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10,2));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'A', 10.50), (2, 'B', 20.75), (3, 'C', NULL);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT id, 0.00 FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL) combined ORDER BY -value ASC;
SELECT name FROM (SELECT name FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id < 3) names ORDER BY name ASC;
SELECT value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value > 5 UNION ALL SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL) values_combined ORDER BY -value ASC;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY with UNION ALL causes incorrect sorting
